heroHeadline: AI Delivering Measurable Impact in Health, Food Security, Climate & Education
heroSubtitle: From AlphaFold's 214M protein structures to WFP's AI hunger forecasts covering 50+ countries — tracking how artificial intelligence drives real outcomes globally since 2020. Clinical AI now cuts physician paperwork by up to 83%.
footerNote: Data sourced from peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Science, The Lancet), UN agencies (WHO, FAO, WFP, UNESCO, ITU), and major technology research outlets. Impact claims require independent validation; contested figures are marked.
